delete.where: ROLE_ID in (SELECT ID FROM ROLE WHERE NAME = 'admin') and ACCESS_RIGHT_ID in (SELECT ID FROM ACCESS_RIGHT WHERE NAME in ('DOCUMENT_READ', 'DOCUMENT_WRITE', 'MODEL_READ', 'MODEL_WRITE')) or ROLE_ID in (SELECT ID FROM ROLE WHERE NAME = 'guest') and ACCESS_RIGHT_ID in (SELECT ID FROM ACCESS_RIGHT WHERE NAME in ('DOCUMENT_READ', 'MODEL_READ'))

USER_ID in (select ID from SERVER_USER where user_name = 'admin') and ROLE_ID in (select ID from role where name = 'admin') or USER_ID in (select ID from SERVER_USER where user_name = 'guest') and ROLE_ID in (select ID from role where name = 'guest')
